case_title: AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. VS GARCIA VICTOR

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,379.20 FILED BY AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA VICTOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-29-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA VICTOR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA VICTOR $1,379.20 PRINCIPAL, $48.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,427.20 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
LTR BY PLNTF TO COMM. KAPLAN REQUEST AN AMENDED J TO $3288.00.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA VICTOR $3,288.00 PRINCIPAL, $48.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,336.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $500.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $81.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA VICTOR
